Alex
Upgrade

Patient Care Website

2
👉 Website me ye pages hone chahiye: 🏠 Home Page “Trusted Patient Care at Home” Call button 📞 WhatsApp button 👩‍⚕️ Services Page Aaya service Elder care Home nursing Attendant service 👨‍👩‍👧 About Us Tumhara experience Kitne saal se kaam kar rahe ho Trust build karo ⭐ Reviews Page Real customer feedback 👉 Ye sabse powerful hota hai 📞 Contact Page Phone WhatsApp Address 🏠 HOME PAGE Heading: Trusted Patient Care Services at Home Sub-heading: Professional Aaya, Nurse & Elder Care Services at Your Doorstep Description: Hum experienced aur verified staff provide karte hain jo aapke ghar par patient aur elderly care ka pura dhyaan rakhte hain. 24/7 support available. Buttons: 📞 Call Now 💬 WhatsApp Now 👩‍⚕️ SERVICES PAGE 1. Aaya Service Daily care, bathing, feeding, patient support 2. Home Nursing Injection, dressing, medical care by trained nurses 3. Elder Care Old parents ke liye full-time support 4. Attendant Service Hospital ya home me assistant 👨‍👩‍👧 ABOUT US Hum [X] saal se patient care services provide kar rahe hain. Hamara mission hai ki har patient ko ghar jaisa safe aur caring environment mile. Hamare saare staff verified aur trained hain. ⭐ REVIEWS SECTION ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ “Bahut acchi service thi, staff bahut helpful tha” 👉 (Real reviews add karna zaruri hai) 📞 CONTACT PAGE Phone number WhatsApp link Address Timing
Edit
Copy
Share
Maine aapke requirements ke hisaab se ek professional, responsive aur modern healthcare website ka code banaya hai. Yeh code aapke Home Care Services ke liye perfect hai.

✨ Key Features:

  • Responsive Design: Mobile aur desktop dono par perfect chalega
  • Modern UI/UX: Gradient effects, smooth animations, aur professional color scheme
  • Interactive Elements: Hover effects, scroll animations, aur mobile-friendly navigation
  • WhatsApp Integration: Direct WhatsApp chat button
  • SEO Optimized: Proper headings aur meta tags
  • Fast Loading: Optimized CSS aur lightweight structure
HTML
Preview
Copy
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="hi">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Trusted Patient Care at Home | Professional Healthcare Services</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Professional Aaya, Nurse & Elder Care Services at Your Doorstep. 24/7 support available with experienced and verified staff.">
    
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <!-- AOS Animation Library -->
    <link href="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.css" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Poppins', 'sans-serif'],
                        body: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        primary: '#0ea5e9',
                        secondary: '#6366f1',
                        accent: '#f59e0b',
                        dark: '#0f172a',
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    
    <style>
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9 0%, #6366f1 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }
        
        .hero-gradient {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f9ff 0%, #e0e7ff 50%, #fef3c7 100%);
        }
        
        .card-hover {
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .card-hover:hover {
            transform: translateY(-10px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        
        .floating {
            animation: floating 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes floating {
            0% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
            100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        }
        
        .pulse-ring {
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .pulse-ring::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.4);
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            z-index: -1;
        }
        
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5); opacity: 0; }
        }
        
        .glass-effect {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }
        
        .sticky-nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .nav-scrolled {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        
        .service-icon {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9 0%, #6366f1 100%);
        }
        
        .review-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%);
        }
        
        .whatsapp-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366 0%, #128C7E 100%);
        }
        
        .call-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ea5e9 0%, #0284c7 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="font-body text-gray-700 antialiased overflow-x-hidden">

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <nav id="navbar" class="sticky-nav py-4 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-2" data-aos="fade-right">
                <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-secondary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-xl">
                    <i class="fas fa-heartbeat"></i>
                </div>
                <span class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-800 font-sans">Care<span class="gradient-text">AtHome</span></span>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Desktop Menu -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8" data-aos="fade-left">
                <a href="#home" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Home</a>
                <a href="#services" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Services</a>
                <a href="#about" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">About Us</a>
                <a href="#reviews" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Reviews</a>
                <a href="#contact" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Contact</a>
                <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-medium hover:shadow-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i class="fas fa-phone"></i> Call Now
                </a>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Mobile Menu Button -->
            <button id="mobile-menu-btn" class="md:hidden text-gray-700 text-2xl focus:outline-none">
                <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Mobile Menu -->
        <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden md:hidden mt-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-4 absolute left-4 right-4 top-full">
            <div class="flex flex-col space-y-4">
                <a href="#home" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Home</a>
                <a href="#services" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Services</a>
                <a href="#about" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">About Us</a>
                <a href="#reviews" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Reviews</a>
                <a href="#contact" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2">Contact</a>
                <div class="flex gap-3 pt-2">
                    <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-center flex-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-phone mr-2"></i>Call
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="whatsapp-btn text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-center flex-1">
                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp mr-2"></i>WhatsApp
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section id="home" class="hero-gradient min-h-screen flex items-center pt-20 pb-16 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background Decorations -->
        <div class="absolute top-20 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-primary/10 rounded-full blur-3xl floating"></div>
        <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-72 h-72 bg-secondary/10 rounded-full blur-3xl floating" style="animation-delay: 1.5s;"></div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center relative z-10">
            <div data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-duration="1000">
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-primary font-medium text-sm mb-6 shadow-sm">
                    <span class="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></span>
                    24/7 Support Available
                </div>
                
                <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans leading-tight mb-6">
                    Trusted Patient Care <br>
                    <span class="gradient-text">Services at Home</span>
                </h1>
                
                <p class="text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-600 mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
                    Professional <strong>Aaya, Nurse & Elder Care Services</strong> at Your Doorstep. Hum experienced aur verified staff provide karte hain jo aapke ghar par patient aur elderly care ka pura dhyaan rakhte hain.
                </p>
                
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 mb-8">
                    <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold text-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3 pulse-ring">
                        <i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-xl"></i>
                        <div class="text-left">
                            <div class="text-xs opacity-90">Call Now</div>
                            <div class="font-bold">+91 99999 99999</div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                    
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="whatsapp-btn text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold text-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp text-2xl"></i>
                        <div class="text-left">
                            <div class="text-xs opacity-90">Chat on</div>
                            <div class="font-bold">WhatsApp</div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>
                        <span>Verified Staff</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>
                        <span>24/7 Available</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-green-500"></i>
                        <span>Affordable</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="relative" data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-duration="1000">
                <div class="relative z-10">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160399-112ba8d25d1d?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Healthcare at Home" class="rounded-3xl shadow-2xl w-full object-cover h-[500px]">
                    
                    <!-- Floating Stats Card -->
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-6 -left-6 bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl max-w-xs" data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="500">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                            <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600 text-2xl">
                                <i class="fas fa-smile"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">1000+</div>
                                <div class="text-sm text-gray-600">Happy Families</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Experience Badge -->
                    <div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-secondary text-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl" data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="700">
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">5+</div>
                            <div class="text-xs">Years Experience</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-secondary/20 rounded-3xl transform rotate-3 -z-10"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Services Section -->
    <section id="services" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="text-center mb-16" data-aos="fade-up">
                <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Our Services</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-4">Comprehensive Care Services</h2>
                <p class="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Har patient ki unique needs ke hisaab se hum customized care plans offer karte hain</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                <!-- Service 1: Aaya Service -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="service-icon w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                        <i class="fas fa-hands-helping"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Aaya Service</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Daily care & assistance</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Bathing & grooming</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Feeding & meal prep</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Patient support</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Aaya Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-primary font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 2: Home Nursing -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="service-icon w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-nurse"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Home Nursing</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Injection & IV drip</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Wound dressing</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Vital monitoring</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Trained nurses</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Home Nursing Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-secondary font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 3: Elder Care -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-accent/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%);">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Elder Care</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Full-time support</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Companionship</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Medication reminders</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Mobility assistance</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Elder Care Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-amber-600 font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 4: Attendant Service -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="400">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-500/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981 0%, #059669 100%);">
                        <i class="fas fa-hospital-user"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Attendant Service</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Hospital assistance</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Home assistant</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Doctor visit support</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>24/7 availability</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Attendant Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-green-600 font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- About Us Section -->
    <section id="about" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-gray-50 relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-secondary/5"></div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto relative z-10">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
                <div class="relative" data-aos="fade-right">
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579684385127-1ef15d508118?w=400&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Medical Care" class="rounded-2xl shadow-lg w-full h-64 object-cover transform translate-y-8">
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581056771107-24ca5f033842?w=400&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Elderly Care" class="rounded-2xl shadow-lg w-full h-64 object-cover">
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-6 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 bg-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-xl flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div class="flex -space-x-3">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559839734-2b71ea197ec2?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612349317150-e413f6a5b16d?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594824476967-48c8b964273f?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">50+ Expert Staff</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div data-aos="fade-left">
                    <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">About Us</span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-6">Experience & Trust in Every Care</h2>
                    
                    <div class="space-y-6 text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                        <p class="text-lg">
                            Hum <strong class="text-primary text-xl">5+ saal</strong> se patient care services provide kar rahe hain. Hamara mission hai ki har patient ko ghar jaisa safe aur caring environment mile.
                        </p>
                        
                        <p>
                            Hamare saare staff <strong>verified aur trained</strong> hain. Har caregiver ko properly screen kiya jaata hai aur unki background check ki jaati hai taaki aapko best service mile.
                        </p>
                        
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mt-8">
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-primary flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-shield-alt text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Verified Staff</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Police verified & background checked</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-secondary/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-secondary flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">24/7 Available</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Round the clock support</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-accent/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-accent flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-rupee-sign text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Affordable</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Competitive pricing</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-green-500/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-green-600 flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-undo text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Replacement</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Easy staff replacement</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Stats Section -->
    <section class="py-16 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-secondary text-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 text-center">
            <div data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="100">
                <div class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-2">5+</div>
                <div class="text-primary-100">Years Experience</div>
            </div>
            <div data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="200">
                <div class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-2">1000+</div>
                <div class="text-primary-100">Happy Families</div>
            </div>
            <div data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="300">
                <div class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-2">50+</div>
                <div class="text-primary-100">Expert Staff</div>
            </div>
            <div data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="400">
                <div class="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-2">24/7</div>
                <div class="text-primary-100">Support</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Reviews Section -->
    <section id="reviews" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="text-center mb-16" data-aos="fade-up">
                <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Testimonials</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-4">What Our Clients Say</h2>
                <p class="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Real feedback from real families jo humari services use kar chuke hain</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
                <!-- Review 1 -->
                <div class="review-card p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
                    <div class="flex text-yellow-400 text-lg mb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 mb-6 italic">"Bahut acchi service thi, staff bahut helpful tha. Meri mother ko proper care mila aur unki health mein bhi improvement dikha. Highly recommended!"</p>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-secondary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold">
                            RS
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="font-bold text-gray-900">Rahul Sharma</div>
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Delhi</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Review 2 -->
                <div class="review-card p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
                    <div class="flex text-yellow-400 text-lg mb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 mb-6 italic">"Home nursing service excellent thi. Nurse punctual thi aur patient ko bahut ache se handle karti thi. Injection aur dressing bilkul professional tareeke se ki."</p>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary to-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold">
                            PG
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="font-bold text-gray-900">Priya Gupta</div>
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Noida</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Review 3 -->
                <div class="review-card p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
                    <div class="flex text-yellow-400 text-lg mb-4">
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star"></i>
                        <i class="fas fa-star-half-alt"></i>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 mb-6 italic">"Elder care service ke liye CareAtHome ko choose kiya. Father ko full-time care mili aur unko company bhi mili. Staff bahut polite aur caring tha."</p>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-accent to-orange-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold">
                            AK
                        </div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="font-bold text-gray-900">Amit Kumar</div>
                            <div class="text-sm text-gray-500">Gurgaon</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="text-center mt-12">
                <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I want to share my feedback" class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-primary font-semibold hover:gap-3 transition-all">
                    Share Your Experience <i class="fas fa-arrow-right"></i>
                </a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Contact Section -->
    <section id="contact" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-gray-50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12">
                <div data-aos="fade-right">
                    <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Contact Us</span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-6">Get in Touch</h2>
                    <p class="text-gray-600 mb-8">Kisi bhi service ke liye inquiry karein. Hum 24/7 available hain aapki help ke liye.</p>
                    
                    <div class="space-y-6">
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                            <div class="w-14 h-14 bg-primary/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-primary text-xl flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fas fa-phone-alt"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Phone</h4>
                                <p class="text-gray-600 mb-2">24/7 Call karein</p>
                                <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="text-primary font-semibold text-lg hover:underline">+91 99999 99999</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                            <div class="w-14 h-14 bg-green-500/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-green-600 text-xl flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fab fa-whatsapp"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">WhatsApp</h4>
                                <p class="text-gray-600 mb-2">Direct message karein</p>
                                <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="text-green-600 font-semibold text-lg hover:underline">+91 99999 99999</a>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                            <div class="w-14 h-14 bg-accent/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-accent text-xl flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Address</h4>
                                <p class="text-gray-600">123, Health Care Center,<br>Main Market, Delhi - 110001</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                            <div class="w-14 h-14 bg-secondary/10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-secondary text-xl flex-shrink-0">
                                <i class="fas fa-clock"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Timing</h4>
                                <p class="text-gray-600">Monday - Sunday<br>24 Hours Available</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-xl" data-aos="fade-left">
                    <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6 font-sans">Quick Inquiry</h3>
                    <form id="contactForm" class="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Aapka Name</label>
                            <input type="text" id="name" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Enter your name" required>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Phone Number</label>
                            <input type="tel" id="phone" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Enter your phone number" required>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Service Required</label>
                            <select id="service" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all" required>
                                <option value="">Select Service</option>
                                <option value="Aaya Service">Aaya Service</option>
                                <option value="Home Nursing">Home Nursing</option>
                                <option value="Elder Care">Elder Care</option>
                                <option value="Attendant Service">Attendant Service</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div>
                            <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Message</label>
                            <textarea id="message" rows="3" class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-gray-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all" placeholder="Brief description of your requirements"></textarea>
                        </div>
                        
                        <button type="submit" class="w-full call-btn text-white py-4 rounded-lg font-semibold text-lg hover:shadow-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                            <i class="fab fa-whatsapp"></i>
                            Send on WhatsApp
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer class="bg-dark text-white py-12 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
            <div>
                <div class="flex items-center space-x-2 mb-4">
                    <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-secondary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-xl">
                        <i class="fas fa-heartbeat"></i>
                    </div>
                    <span class="text-2xl font-bold font-sans">Care<span class="text-primary">AtHome</span></span>
                </div>
                <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm leading-relaxed">Professional patient care services at your doorstep. Trusted by 1000+ families.</p>
            </div>
            
            <div>
                <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Quick Links</h4>
                <ul class="space-y-2 text-gray-400">
                    <li><a href="#home" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Home</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Services</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#about" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">About Us</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#reviews" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Reviews</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            
            <div>
                <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Services</h4>
                <ul class="space-y-2 text-gray-400">
                    <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Aaya Service</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Home Nursing</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Elder Care</a></li>
                    <li><a href="#services" class="hover:text-primary transition-colors">Attendant Service</a></li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            
            <div>
                <h4 class="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Contact</h4>
                <ul class="space-y-3 text-gray-400">
                    <li class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-phone text-primary"></i>
                        <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="hover:text-white">+91 99999 99999</a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp text-green-500"></i>
                        <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="hover:text-white">WhatsApp</a>
                    </li>
                    <li class="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <i class="fas fa-envelope text-primary"></i>
                        <span>care@home.com</span>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-gray-800 text-center text-gray-400 text-sm">
            <p>&copy; 2024 CareAtHome. All rights reserved. | Trusted Patient Care Services</p>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <!-- Floating Action Buttons -->
    <div class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 flex flex-col gap-4 z-50">
        <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="w-14 h-14 call-btn rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform pulse-ring">
            <i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-xl"></i>
        </a>
        <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="w-14 h-14 whatsapp-btn rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
            <i class="fab fa-whatsapp text-2xl"></i>
        </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.js"></script>
    <script>
        // Initialize AOS Animation
        AOS.init({
            duration: 800,
            once: true,
            offset: 100
        });

        // Mobile Menu Toggle
        const mobileMenuBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-btn');
        const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
        
        mobileMenuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('hidden');
        });

        // Navbar Scroll Effect
        const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
        window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
            if (window.scrollY > 50) {
                navbar.classList.add('nav-scrolled');
            } else {
                navbar.classList.remove('nav-scrolled');
            }
        });

        // Smooth Scroll
        document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
            anchor.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                const target = document.querySelector(this.getAttribute('href'));
                if (target) {
                    target.scrollIntoView({
                        behavior: 'smooth',
                        block: 'start'
                    });
                    mobileMenu.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });

        // Form Submission
        document.getElementById('contactForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const name = document.getElementById('name').value;
            const phone = document.getElementById('phone').value;
            const service = document.getElementById('service').value;
            const message = document.getElementById('message').value;
            
            const whatsappMessage = `Hello, I am ${name}. I am interested in ${service}. My phone number is ${phone}. ${message ? 'Message: ' + message : ''}`;
            
            const whatsappUrl = `https://wa.me/919999999999?text=${encodeURIComponent(whatsappMessage)}`;
            window.open(whatsappUrl, '_blank');
        });

        // Add scroll reveal for elements without AOS
        const observerOptions = {
            threshold: 0.1,
            rootMargin: "0px 0px -50px 0px"
        };

        const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    entry.target.style.opacity = "1";
                    entry.target.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
                }
            });
        }, observerOptions);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

🎯 Is Website Mein Kya Kya Hai:

1. Home Page Features:
  • Eye-catching gradient hero section
  • Floating animations aur professional design
  • Prominent Call & WhatsApp buttons
  • Trust badges (Verified Staff, 24/7, Affordable)
  • Stats counter (5+ Years, 1000+ Families, etc.)
2. Services Page:
  • 4 Cards with icons (Aaya, Nursing, Elder Care, Attendant)
  • Hover effects aur smooth transitions
  • Direct WhatsApp booking links har service ke liye
3. About Us:
  • Experience highlight (5+ years)
  • Mission statement
  • 4 Key features grid layout
  • Staff images with overlap design
4. Reviews Section:
  • 3 Testimonial cards with star ratings
  • Customer names aur locations
  • Gradient backgrounds
5. Contact Page:
  • Contact details (Phone, WhatsApp, Address, Timing)
  • Quick Inquiry Form jo directly WhatsApp pe message bhejta hai
  • Interactive form validation
6. Extra Features:
  • Sticky Navigation jo scroll pe change hota hai
  • Floating Action Buttons (Call & WhatsApp) bottom right corner mein
  • Mobile Responsive hamburger menu
  • Smooth Scroll navigation
  • AOS Animations har section mein
  • Professional Color Scheme (Blue gradients)

📝 Customization Guide:

Phone Number Change Karne Ke Liye:
  • Har jagah 919999999999 ko apna number se replace karein
  • Format: Country code ke saath (91 for India) aur number bina spaces ke
Images Change Karne Ke Liye:
  • Unsplash URLs ko apni images se replace karein
  • Ya local images use karein: src="images/your-image.jpg"
Content Edit Karne Ke Liye:
  • Text directly HTML mein edit karein
  • Reviews apne real customer feedback se update karein
Colors Change Karne Ke Liye:
  • Tailwind config mein colors object edit karein
  • Primary, secondary, accent colors customize karein
Yeh code aap directly use kar sakte hain. Bas phone number aur address update karein, aur website ready hai! 🚀
isme naam care at home ki jagah patient care services likhna ok or logo ye lagana
Edit
Copy
Share
Maine aapke logo ke hisaab se website ko customize kar diya hai. Ab "Patient Care Services" (PCS) naam ke saath aur aapke green cross logo ke colors mein website ready hai.
HTML
Preview
Copy
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="hi">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Patient Care Services | Trusted Home Healthcare</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Professional Aaya, Nurse & Elder Care Services at Your Doorstep. 24/7 support available with experienced and verified staff.">
    
    <!-- Tailwind CSS -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    
    <!-- Google Fonts -->
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <!-- Font Awesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <!-- AOS Animation Library -->
    <link href="https://unpkg.com/aos@2.3.1/dist/aos.css" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    fontFamily: {
                        sans: ['Poppins', 'sans-serif'],
                        body: ['Inter', 'sans-serif'],
                    },
                    colors: {
                        primary: '#22c55e',      // Green from logo
                        secondary: '#dc2626',    // Red from logo
                        accent: '#f59e0b',
                        dark: '#0f172a',
                        light: '#f0fdf4',        // Light green bg
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>
    
    <style>
        .gradient-text {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #22c55e 0%, #dc2626 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }
        
        .hero-gradient {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0fdf4 0%, #fef2f2 50%, #fff7ed 100%);
        }
        
        .card-hover {
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .card-hover:hover {
            transform: translateY(-10px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        
        .floating {
            animation: floating 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        
        @keyframes floating {
            0% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(-20px); }
            100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
        }
        
        .pulse-ring {
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .pulse-ring::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.4);
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
            z-index: -1;
        }
        
        @keyframes pulse {
            0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5); opacity: 0; }
        }
        
        .glass-effect {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }
        
        .sticky-nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            width: 100%;
            z-index: 1000;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }
        
        .nav-scrolled {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
        
        .service-icon {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #22c55e 0%, #16a34a 100%);
        }
        
        .review-card {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%);
        }
        
        .whatsapp-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366 0%, #128C7E 100%);
        }
        
        .call-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626 0%, #b91c1c 100%);
        }
        
        /* Logo Cross Animation */
        .logo-cross {
            position: relative;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
        }
        
        .cross-vertical {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #22c55e 0%, #16a34a 100%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        
        .cross-horizontal {
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #22c55e 0%, #16a34a 100%);
            border-radius: 2px;
            box-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }
        
        .logo-text {
            font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: bold;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626 0%, #b91c1c 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="font-body text-gray-700 antialiased overflow-x-hidden">

    <!-- Navigation -->
    <nav id="navbar" class="sticky-nav py-4 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 transition-all duration-300">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
            <div class="flex items-center space-x-3" data-aos="fade-right">
                <!-- Logo Cross -->
                <div class="logo-cross">
                    <div class="cross-vertical"></div>
                    <div class="cross-horizontal"></div>
                    <span class="relative z-10 text-white font-bold text-xs italic" style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;">PCS</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex flex-col">
                    <span class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-800 font-sans leading-tight">Patient</span>
                    <span class="text-lg logo-text -mt-1">Care Services</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Desktop Menu -->
            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-8" data-aos="fade-left">
                <a href="#home" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Home</a>
                <a href="#services" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Services</a>
                <a href="#about" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">About Us</a>
                <a href="#reviews" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Reviews</a>
                <a href="#contact" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium transition-colors">Contact</a>
                <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-full font-medium hover:shadow-lg transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i class="fas fa-phone"></i> Call Now
                </a>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Mobile Menu Button -->
            <button id="mobile-menu-btn" class="md:hidden text-gray-700 text-2xl focus:outline-none">
                <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Mobile Menu -->
        <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden md:hidden mt-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-4 absolute left-4 right-4 top-full">
            <div class="flex flex-col space-y-4">
                <a href="#home" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Home</a>
                <a href="#services" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Services</a>
                <a href="#about" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">About Us</a>
                <a href="#reviews" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2 border-b border-gray-100">Reviews</a>
                <a href="#contact" class="text-gray-700 hover:text-primary font-medium py-2">Contact</a>
                <div class="flex gap-3 pt-2">
                    <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-center flex-1">
                        <i class="fas fa-phone mr-2"></i>Call
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="whatsapp-btn text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-center flex-1">
                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp mr-2"></i>WhatsApp
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <!-- Hero Section -->
    <section id="home" class="hero-gradient min-h-screen flex items-center pt-20 pb-16 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 relative overflow-hidden">
        <!-- Background Decorations -->
        <div class="absolute top-20 right-0 w-96 h-96 bg-primary/10 rounded-full blur-3xl floating"></div>
        <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-72 h-72 bg-secondary/10 rounded-full blur-3xl floating" style="animation-delay: 1.5s;"></div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center relative z-10">
            <div data-aos="fade-right" data-aos-duration="1000">
                <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-primary font-medium text-sm mb-6 shadow-sm">
                    <span class="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></span>
                    24/7 Support Available
                </div>
                
                <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans leading-tight mb-6">
                    Trusted Patient Care <br>
                    <span class="gradient-text">Services at Home</span>
                </h1>
                
                <p class="text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-600 mb-8 leading-relaxed max-w-lg">
                    Professional <strong>Aaya, Nurse & Elder Care Services</strong> at Your Doorstep. Hum experienced aur verified staff provide karte hain jo aapke ghar par patient aur elderly care ka pura dhyaan rakhte hain.
                </p>
                
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 mb-8">
                    <a href="tel:+919999999999" class="call-btn text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold text-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3 pulse-ring">
                        <i class="fas fa-phone-alt text-xl"></i>
                        <div class="text-left">
                            <div class="text-xs opacity-90">Call Now</div>
                            <div class="font-bold">+91 99999 99999</div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                    
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999" class="whatsapp-btn text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-semibold text-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp text-2xl"></i>
                        <div class="text-left">
                            <div class="text-xs opacity-90">Chat on</div>
                            <div class="font-bold">WhatsApp</div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <div class="flex items-center gap-6 text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-primary"></i>
                        <span>Verified Staff</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-primary"></i>
                        <span>24/7 Available</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <i class="fas fa-check-circle text-primary"></i>
                        <span>Affordable</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="relative" data-aos="fade-left" data-aos-duration="1000">
                <div class="relative z-10">
                    <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1576091160399-112ba8d25d1d?w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Healthcare at Home" class="rounded-3xl shadow-2xl w-full object-cover h-[500px]">
                    
                    <!-- Floating Stats Card -->
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-6 -left-6 bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-xl max-w-xs" data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="500">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
                            <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-green-600 text-2xl">
                                <i class="fas fa-smile"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">1000+</div>
                                <div class="text-sm text-gray-600">Happy Families</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- Experience Badge -->
                    <div class="absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary to-green-600 text-white p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-xl" data-aos="zoom-in" data-aos-delay="700">
                        <div class="text-center">
                            <div class="text-3xl font-bold">5+</div>
                            <div class="text-xs">Years Experience</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Decorative Elements -->
                <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/20 to-secondary/20 rounded-3xl transform rotate-3 -z-10"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Services Section -->
    <section id="services" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            <div class="text-center mb-16" data-aos="fade-up">
                <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">Our Services</span>
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-4">Comprehensive Care Services</h2>
                <p class="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">Har patient ki unique needs ke hisaab se hum customized care plans offer karte hain</p>
            </div>
            
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                <!-- Service 1: Aaya Service -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="100">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="service-icon w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                        <i class="fas fa-hands-helping"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Aaya Service</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Daily care & assistance</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Bathing & grooming</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Feeding & meal prep</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-primary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Patient support</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Aaya Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-primary font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 2: Home Nursing -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="200">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-secondary/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626 0%, #b91c1c 100%);">
                        <i class="fas fa-user-nurse"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Home Nursing</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Injection & IV drip</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Wound dressing</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Vital monitoring</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-secondary mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Trained nurses</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Home Nursing Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-secondary font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 3: Elder Care -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="300">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-accent/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #d97706 100%);">
                        <i class="fas fa-heart"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Elder Care</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Full-time support</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Companionship</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Medication reminders</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-accent mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Mobility assistance</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Elder Care Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-amber-600 font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Service 4: Attendant Service -->
                <div class="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group" data-aos="fade-up" data-aos-delay="400">
                    <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-500/10 to-transparent rounded-bl-full"></div>
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-3xl mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981 0%, #059669 100%);">
                        <i class="fas fa-hospital-user"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3 font-sans">Attendant Service</h3>
                    <ul class="text-gray-600 space-y-2 mb-6 text-sm">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Hospital assistance</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Home assistant</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>Doctor visit support</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <i class="fas fa-check text-green-500 mt-1"></i>
                            <span>24/7 availability</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="https://wa.me/919999999999?text=Hi, I am interested in Attendant Service" class="inline-flex items-center text-green-600 font-semibold hover:gap-2 transition-all">
                        Book Now <i class="fas fa-arrow-right ml-2"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- About Us Section -->
    <section id="about" class="py-20 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-gray-50 relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-full bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 to-secondary/5"></div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto relative z-10">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
                <div class="relative" data-aos="fade-right">
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579684385127-1ef15d508118?w=400&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Medical Care" class="rounded-2xl shadow-lg w-full h-64 object-cover transform translate-y-8">
                        <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1581056771107-24ca5f033842?w=400&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" alt="Elderly Care" class="rounded-2xl shadow-lg w-full h-64 object-cover">
                    </div>
                    <div class="absolute -bottom-6 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 bg-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-xl flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div class="flex -space-x-3">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1559839734-2b71ea197ec2?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1612349317150-e413f6a5b16d?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                            <img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594824476967-48c8b964273f?w=100&auto=format&fit=crop&q=80" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-2 border-white object-cover">
                        </div>
                        <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">50+ Expert Staff</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div data-aos="fade-left">
                    <span class="text-primary font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wider">About Us</span>
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 font-sans mt-2 mb-6">Experience & Trust in Every Care</h2>
                    
                    <div class="space-y-6 text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                        <p class="text-lg">
                            Hum <strong class="text-primary text-xl">5+ saal</strong> se patient care services provide kar rahe hain. Hamara mission hai ki har patient ko ghar jaisa safe aur caring environment mile.
                        </p>
                        
                        <p>
                            Hamare saare staff <strong>verified aur trained</strong> hain. Har caregiver ko properly screen kiya jaata hai aur unki background check ki jaati hai taaki aapko best service mile.
                        </p>
                        
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6 mt-8">
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-primary flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-shield-alt text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Verified Staff</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Police verified & background checked</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-secondary/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-secondary flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-clock text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">24/7 Available</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Round the clock support</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-accent/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-accent flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-rupee-sign text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Affordable</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Competitive pricing</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="w-12 h-12 bg-green-500/10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-green-600 flex-shrink-0">
                                    <i class="fas fa-undo text-xl"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">Replacement</h4>
                                    <p class="text-sm">Easy staff replacement</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Stats Section -->
    <section class="py-16 px-4 md:px-8 lg:px-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-green-600 text-white">
